claimText: University of Melbourne students must appropriately cite any use of GenAI tools in the preparation of assessment submissions.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Any use of GenAI in the preparation of an assessment submission must be appropriately cited.

citation.citationTitle: Generative AI in T&L at the University of Melbourne
